description: Style Note This blue tunic from w is a harmonious blend of ethnic, smart and chic. Look ethnically hip in this tunic, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely comfortable through the day. Team the top with skinny jeans and wedge heels for a fab look. Product Details  Blue tunic made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, is sleeveless and has lacing around the armhole, neckline and hem Material and Care 100% cotton Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
